citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 9:30 AM on
2/25/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by calling main phone number, left voice messages,
and waited approx. 30 minutes in lobby of building. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in
enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.38(b) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 9:30 AM on 
2/25/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by calling main phone number, left voice messages, 
and waited approx. 30 minutes in lobby of building. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for 
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in 
enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
